_human_review.notes: Project owner instructed Codex to mark the US Stage B generated/reconciled tests as approved for internal/project benchmarking after manual review on 2026-06-05. This is not legal advice, external counsel review, or procurement-grade legal approval; candidate labels remain separate from locked recall baselines.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: US Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: US Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed SA/US Stage B detector precision fixes

_strict_runtime_reconciliation.reason: items 1-3 deterministic detector breadth strict-label reconciliation

must_detect.matched_text: Processing purpose: healthcare-banking analytics and fraud defense using minimum necessary data; no sale of personal information; GLBA and HIPAA carve-outs preserved; de-identification per NIST/ONC guidance.
Reg FD discipline: market-facing disclosures only via Form 8‑K, earnings release, or webcast; non-deal roadshow materials must be pre-cleared; internal draft decks are not for distribution.

Processing purpose: healthcare-banking analytics and fraud defense using minimum necessary data; no sale of personal information; GLBA and HIPAA carve-outs preserved; de-identification per NIST/ONC guidance.  
MNPI protocol: no selective disclosure to analysts, investors, or broker-dealers; wall-crossing required for covered research; communications must route through Investor Relations; tipping is prohibited.  
Sensitive event notice (confidential): 2026-05-27 cyber anomaly on Orchard-EHR archival bucket (us-east-1) under review; treat as potentially material until assessed; internal case “Project Larch.”  
Insider list (restricted): Mr. Jae Kim (SVP SecOps), Dr. Lila Mercado (CMO), Ms. Farah DuPont (Compliance), vendor lead Mr. Aaron Vale; list maintained at htt ps://invest.vireo.example/insider?case=L A R C H-01; trading blackout effective T+0 for covered persons.  
Information barriers: CipherSage research team segregated from Vireo capital markets; no sharing of CareCoin pilot metrics with equity research until 8‑K or press release; physical and logical barriers enforced.  
Digital asset pilot (non-public): “CareCoin” rewards token for HSA wellness cohorts launching on testnet; do not discuss token economics or on-chain partner selection with external analysts prior to public disclosure; internal code ref: PRJ‑SPRU CE‑α.  
Commercial terms (confidential): Nimbus Cloud Services sustainability-SLA bundle at $12.4m/year with 99.95% EHR uptime and carbon-offset certification; green loan term sheet contemplates a 10 bps step-down tied to Scope 1+2 reductions—treat as MNPI.  
Reg FD discipline: market-facing disclosures only via Form 8‑K, earnings release, or webcast; non-deal roadshow materials must be pre-cleared; internal draft decks are not for distribution.  
Educational/marketing note: our ESG training module uses examples of “climate-linked” loans and “tokenization” vocabulary for awareness only and contains no live commercial terms or MNPI.  
DSAR workflow: verify identity, exclude privileged or trade-secret content and MNPI from responses, and apply GLBA/HIPAA exceptions; submit requests via privacy@vireohealthbank.example or 1‑833‑555‑0199; masked IDs (e.g., x x x‑xx‑4 3 2 1) only in correspondence.  
Data transfers and retention: US-only storage (us-east-1/us-west-2), AES‑256 at rest, TLS in transit; incident logs retained 24 months; DocID: VHB‑DPA‑20 26 se g m e n t: 04; audit trail hashes posted internally at htt ps://go.vireo.example/audit?d=VHB‑DPA‑04.  
Materiality caveat: this addendum does not constitute, and shall not be deemed, a material adverse change, an offer to sell any security or token, or a public communication for Reg FD purposes.  
Public reference: Scope 2 emissions baselines are already disclosed in Vireo’s 2026 Q1 ESG Report; nothing herein supersedes public filings.
